name: atlas-blob-compute-smoke-persistent
description: E5 Phase 7g — compute marcher with persistent threading (Strategy S7). Replaces the per-tile dispatch loop with a single dispatch of `persistentWorkgroupCount` workgroups (default 32); each workgroup runs a software loop that atomic-claims tile indices from a global counter. Pipeline rebuilds when `enablePersistentThreading` flips (compile-time gate via PERSISTENT_THREADING_ENABLED override constant). Better load balancing than naive per-tile dispatch — most beneficial on multi-SM discrete GPUs; iGPU should see negligible difference. Uses the same atlas-blob scene as the non-persistent smoke for direct visual comparison; output should be pixel-identical (only the dispatch model differs, not the per-pixel march logic).
